_description: Blueprint for feature development teams. Use with TeamCreate or /kickoff.
_requires: Set CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 in your shell or settings.json env section
_workflow: Sequential: planner → architect → implementer → tester → evaluator → lead gate
_usage: TeamCreate with this blueprint, or reference via /kickoff or /build command

roles.name: lead
roles.role: Coordinator — gates spec, plan, and final output. Routes evaluator findings back to implementer if ITERATE verdict.

roles.name: planner
roles.role: Expands brief into full product spec using .claude/agents/planner.md. Produces user stories, features, edge cases, success criteria. Read-only.

roles.name: architect
roles.role: Plans implementation using .claude/agents/architect.md. Read-only. Produces file list, dependencies, sequence, and risks.

roles.name: implementer
roles.role: Writes code following the architect's plan. Creates slices, routes, services, repos. Runs in worktree isolation.

roles.name: tester
roles.role: Writes and runs tests using .claude/agents/tester.md. Co-located test files. Verifies all tests pass before handoff.

roles.name: evaluator
roles.role: Grades output using .claude/agents/evaluator.md. Scores Correctness (3x), Completeness (2x), Quality (2x), UX Coherence (1x). Produces PASS/ITERATE/FAIL verdict.

sequence: 1. planner expands brief into full product spec
2. lead reviews and approves spec (gates before architecture)
3. architect produces structured implementation plan from spec
4. lead reviews and approves plan (gates before implementation)
5. implementer builds feature following the plan
6. tester writes co-located tests and runs full suite
7. evaluator grades output against spec — produces scored verdict
8. lead routes: PASS → done, ITERATE → implementer fixes critical findings, FAIL → user decides
